title: Catalina la Catrina: especial Día de Muertos
original_title: Catalina la Catrina: Especial Día de Muertos
overview: Catalina lives in the underworld and dreams of being an agent that connects the living with their deceased relatives. When the Day of the Dead is in danger of never being celebrated again, she must break all the rules to rescue the bread of the dead and the hot chocolate of this wonderful tradition.
